cast.name: 马达莱娜·库尼亚 Madalena Cunha

this_title: Os Amigos do Gaspar: Uma Reunião na Cidade
introduction: Os Amigos do Gaspar: Uma Reunião na Cidade, a musical film that revisits, more than thirty years later, the children’s programme that marked the imagination of a generation, bringing back iconic characters from the series created by João Paulo Seara Cardoso and Jorge Constante Pereira. Involving members of the original team and new actors, this film project is the result of research and restoration work on the original puppets carried out throughout 2022, with the involvement of the series’ authors.
chinese_title: Os Amigos do Gaspar: Uma Reunião na Cidade
